name: nuget-opensrc
description: Commit-pinned NuGet to GitHub source fetcher: wraps opensrc with catalog metadata so agents grep the exact commit a package shipped from. Ships a command, a research skill, and a Node CLI.

interface.shortDescription: Commit-pinned NuGet→GitHub source fetcher. Wraps opensrc with NuGet catalog metadata so coding agents grep the exact co…
interface.longDescription: Commit-pinned NuGet→GitHub source fetcher. Wraps opensrc with NuGet catalog metadata so coding agents grep the exact commit a package was built from, not whatever's on main. Ships a /nuget-opensrc command, an autonomous opensrc-research skill, and a Node CLI that refuses to silently fall back to projectUrl or default branch.
defaultPrompt: Use NuGet OpenSrc on this repo.
